tasks.title: Bootstrap CLI agent loop
acceptance_criteria: CLI entrypoint can run from python -m agent.main.
Offline provider completes a smoke task.
State and trace files are written.

tasks.title: Add minimal tool layer
acceptance_criteria: read can inspect files and list directories.
bash can run a bounded command.
search and write tool interfaces exist.
Tool observations are recorded in trace.

tasks.title: Add OpenAI-compatible model provider
acceptance_criteria: Provider reads API settings from environment variables.
Protocol errors do not crash the harness.

tasks.title: Add verifier-backed behavior tests
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover key harness behavior.
Verifier runs unit tests during finish checks.
Offline smoke run completes with verifier enabled.

tasks.title: Enforce acceptance contracts before coding
acceptance_criteria: Main Agent can create a task acceptance contract.
write actions are rejected before a contract exists.
Verifier checks contract presence and test evidence.

tasks.title: Run long-task evaluation and ablations
acceptance_criteria: At least one long coding task is run.
At least one mechanism is disabled for ablation.
